channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists find gut-brain circuit that drives protein cravings
item.description: When protein levels drop, the gut sends signals to the brain that alter cravings and push animals to seek essential amino acids.

item.title: NSF launches Tech Accelerators to speed key technologies to market
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a new initiative to accelerate the transfer of basic research results into commercial products.

item.title: NASA's Webb telescope finds a planet where rock clouds disappear each night
item.description: A giant planet 700 light-years away experiences a daily cycle where mineral clouds form at dawn and vanish by dusk.

item.title: Scientists find ancient single-celled ancestors still present in human blood
item.description: Researchers have found evidence that human blood cells may originate from single-celled ancestors that lived 700 million years ago.
